rationale: The citing paper’s note emphasizes jointly modeling browsing-stage and purchase-stage preferences in clickstream sessions, and the cited paper’s stated contribution is an empirical two-stage clickstream model of product views and purchases with stage-varying rules—this is strong conceptual/method overlap. The evidence is only a DOI match (no in-text snippet showing it is merely perfunctory), so there is no clear basis to treat it as an obvious mention-only citation.
